action_set_definitions.name: get_evaluation_context
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current evaluation session ID and global configuration parameters, including the system's latency integrity threshold.

action_set_definitions.name: identify_high_latency_carriers
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a list of carriers whose average electronic data transmission latency exceeds a specified threshold.

threshold_ms.description: The latency threshold to check against.

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_timestamp_metadata
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves discrepant arrival timestamps between carrier electronic notifications and physical warehouse logs for a specific carrier.

carrier_id.description: The unique identifier of the carrier.

action_set_definitions.name: reconcile_and_set_liability
action_set_definitions.description: Reconciles discrepant logs and calculates the final financial liability based on the corrected timestamps.

carrier_id.description: The unique identifier of the carrier.

action_set_definitions.name: check_otif_compliance
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates the On-Time-In-Full (OTIF) percentage and compares it against the contractual safety threshold.

carrier_id.description: The unique identifier of the carrier.

action_set_definitions.name: update_remediation_level
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the carrier's performance standing to a specific remediation level.

carrier_id.description: The unique identifier of the carrier.

action_set_definitions.name: finalize_evaluation
action_set_definitions.description: Formally concludes the evaluation session and sets the status to FINALIZED.

session_id.description: The unique identifier for the evaluation session.

state_description.evaluation_session_id: Unique identifier for the current evaluation session.
state_description.supplier_metadata: A list of available suppliers and their basic profile information.
state_description.scoring_criteria_config: Definition of scoring dimensions (e.g., Quality, Cost, Delivery) and their respective weights.
state_description.current_scores: A mapping of supplier IDs to their currently assigned scores per criterion.
state_description.evaluation_status: The current stage of the process (e.g., 'DATA_ENTRY', 'PENDING_REVIEW', 'FINALIZED').
state_description.audit_log: Internal record of all modifications made during the session.

shipment_logs.notes: Potential Ghost Arrive: EDI pulse detected prior to gate entry
